title: Intro tutorials for MCS API use cases
description:
Develop some vendor agnostic intro tutorials about the MCS API that can be easily digested as part of a generic documentation push. Keep them implementation agnostic but I think it would be useful to tie them to some common use cases as suggested below.

Ideas:
* MCS for a single-cluster stateful service serving multiple clusters (single ServiceExport case) (see [this walkthrough](https://cloud.google.com/kubernetes-engine/docs/how-to/migrate-gke-multi-cluster#migrate_to_multi-cluster_service
